stage_name: 只读启动与项目治理基线

findings.summary: Canonical checkout is behind origin/main and contains non-KMFA dirty changes; direct commit/push is unsafe.
findings.resolution: Use a clean upload worktree based on origin/main and copy only README.md, governance/projects.yaml, and KMFA/.

findings.summary: S01-P3 stop gate evidence in roadmap.yaml was pending.
findings.resolution: Bind S01-P3 stop gate to the actual completion and test evidence.

findings.summary: S01-P2 historical evidence preserves then-current P3 incomplete wording.
findings.resolution: Keep historical snapshot unchanged; current truth is S01-P3 and this Stage review evidence.
